original_image_tags: This is a scan of a typewritten document. The entire document appears to be a mirror image (reversed horizontally). The paper is aged, with two punch holes at the top. A round stamp with illegible text is visible in the top right corner. A piece of tape is on the right edge near the bottom. The document ends with the word "ENCLOSURE" typed at the bottom.

elements.description: Typed document with inverted text (page appears upside down), containing a report header 'Re: UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS; ANOMALOUS INCIDENT DALLAS, TEXAS OCTOBER 5, 1947' and several paragraphs detailing UAP sightings. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.
Faint, circular stamp or seal visible in the top right corner (inverted relative to the typed text).
Small, rectangular brown adhesive label or tape residue visible on the right edge, near the middle of the page.
